test.note: Fixed useBackgroundFetch polling test (fake timer issue). All tests pass.

nonBlockingIssues.description: ProfilePage.tsx still contains hardcoded hex colors (#10b981) but was not in explicit scope (only 6 auth pages listed).
KanbanBoard.tsx tag uses hardcoded '#fff' for text color — acceptable since it's for contrast with user-provided tag colors.
DataTable column definitions in AttendancePage, PayrollPage use Tailwind color utilities (text-green-600, text-red-500) instead of CSS variables. This is a pre-existing pattern carried forward.
SalesOrdersPage has dual pagination (DataTable built-in + manual server-side) that could confuse users.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the CSS variable rule: 'Colors: use var(--color-*) CSS variables, not hex values' should include an exception for semantic status indicator colors where no corresponding CSS variable exists — Tailwind color utilities (text-green-600, text-red-500, etc.) are acceptable for status badges and indicators.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-design-system-bridge and foundation-infrastructure-cleanup both use Tailwind color utilities for status indicators. The CSS variable palette doesn't include semantic status colors (success/danger/warning/info), creating an unavoidable gap. Multiple pages across the codebase use this pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about auto-generated client files at src/lib/client/services/ — these are generated files containing deprecated endpoint references that should not be manually edited. Grep-based checks for deprecated endpoints should exclude this directory.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-infrastructure-cleanup worker found deprecated endpoint references only in auto-generated files. The worker correctly excluded them from cleanup.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker suggested adding a note in the frontend-worker skill about targeted vitest runs being more reliable than the full bun run test --run suite due to timeout issues.
rejectedObservations.note: AGENTS.md already states 'Vitest may timeout on some test suites (known infra issue)'. The timeout was fixed in this validation round by correcting the useBackgroundFetch test.

rejectedObservations.observation: CSS variable usage pattern established by foundation-design-system-bridge should be documented as coding standard.
rejectedObservations.note: AGENTS.md already states 'Colors: use var(--color-*) CSS variables, not hex values'. The suggested refinement about semantic status colors is captured in suggestedGuidanceUpdates.

rejectedObservations.observation: Badge standardization pattern with statusBadgeVariant() helper should be documented.
rejectedObservations.note: AGENTS.md already states 'Use Badge component for all status indicators'. The helper function pattern is a good convention but doesn't require a normative rule.

rejectedObservations.observation: HR/Payroll module is on hold — future workers should be aware.
rejectedObservations.note: AGENTS.md already has a dedicated 'HR/Payroll - ON HOLD' section.

rejectedObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill should have an escape clause for infrastructure-only tasks that don't require frontend-skill invocation or agent-browser.
rejectedObservations.note: Skill procedure changes are normative decisions that the orchestrator should make. Including as a suggestion in the review is sufficient.
